_comment: autonomous-fleet Claude Code hooks template — opt-in 'strict mode'. Install: copy this file to .claude/settings.json (or merge into the existing hooks block). Works in BOTH install modes: the command tries the framework clone (AUTONOMOUS_FLEET_HOME) and the skills-install copy under .agents/skills/ (issue #82). The Stop hook refuses session termination when no EVID / WT_CLEAN / e2e_verified / verify_summary / test_artifact / e2e_artifact evidence exists in the last 30min. See references/strict-mode.md for the full walkthrough.
_lineage: Hook contract follows Claude Code Stop-hook spec. Pattern adapted from claude-code-orchestra/.claude/hooks/stop-verify.sh and multi-llm-plugin-cc/plugins/llm/hooks/hooks.json. See docs/competitor-audit-2026-06-22.md #2.

hooks.command: sh -c 'for p in "${AUTONOMOUS_FLEET_HOME:-$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR}/skills/autonomous-fleet-adapter-claude-code/assets/hooks/stop-verify.sh" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.agents/skills/autonomous-fleet-adapter-claude-code/assets/hooks/stop-verify.sh" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/.claude/hooks/stop-verify.sh"; do [ -f "$p" ] && exec bash "$p"; done; echo "stop-verify: wrapper not found; allowing" >&2'
